3005720.name: Ink Escape: Coven Conundrum
3005720.description:
When your grandmother died, you were inconsolable. Now you just want to feel a bit closer to her. One mishap and you are stuck with your newly acquired ink friend and the magic found between the pages of your inherited books.

This is a first person escape room game. As the player, you will go through new books and environments to discover different stories, while solving puzzles and gathering the components necessary to leave.


This game features:
  • 20+ puzzles
  • A newly found and unusual friend
  • New environments with each book you crack open
  • and more!
3005720.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
